race.comment: PARADING GUS (5) is going well with two minor placings from three starts this prep. Produced another good effort at his most recent run when third over 1200m at Doomben after he was handy all the way. Will enjoy the drop in grade so he is a major player. NEXT EXIT (9) was in contention on the turn and finished second last time over 1100m at Sunshine Coast Poly when resuming from a spell, beaten 1.75 lengths. Placed to advantage so expect another forward showing. IMZADA (17) returned from a spell last start with a solid third, beaten 2.5 lengths, at Sunshine Coast Poly over 1100m. Fitter and worth following up. EXOBRAZEN (4) is going well including a last start fourth over 1100m at Sunshine Coast Poly. Include.
